final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: tactical gear catalog spread, square crop
Primary request: flat-lay display of military tactical equipment arranged in orderly grid
Scene/backdrop: dark matte surface, deep charcoal or black background, clean studio environment
Subject: assorted firearms (rifles, pistols), ballistic vest with MOLLE webbing, night vision goggles, tactical pouches, magazines, arranged in symmetrical neat rows
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, military catalog aesthetic
Composition/framing: top-down flat lay, centered arrangement, wide shot showing full layout
Lighting/mood: cold directional lighting from above, hard shadows, dramatic contrast, professional and imposing atmosphere
Color palette: deep blacks, gunmetal gray, olive drab, muted earth tones, subtle cold highlights
Materials/textures: matte carbon fiber, Cordura nylon, anodized aluminum, rubberized grips, ballistic ceramic plates
Constraints: keep all equipment in sharp focus, maintain orderly military precision in arrangement
Avoid: warm lighting, cluttered composition, cartoonish rendering, plastic toy appearance, lens flare
